refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area by identifying terrain features, detecting obstacles, and representing the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad requirement into specific sub-functions enables targeted design and verification of each critical aspect of worksite mapping, ensuring completeness and clarity.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through sensor data validation, obstacle detection accuracy tests, and work-zone map generation correctness against ground truth data.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect obstacles within the worksite area

candidate_dps: Terrain analysis algorithm using LIDAR and camera fusion
Obstacle detection module leveraging sensor fusion and AI
Work-zone mapping and visualization software component
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated sensor fusion and AI-based worksite analysis system combining terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone mapping

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection
coupling_check.notes: The integrated approach reduces interface complexity and data duplication, minimizing coupling risks.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensor data
Risk of sensor data latency affecting real-time analysis
AI model accuracy must meet safety-critical standards
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing AI components to isolate updates and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for worksite analysis including terrain, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams for analysis

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to planning and execution modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote monitoring and control systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the worksite analysis is core to NGHE; low diffusion risk due to centralized processing.
Limited containment; embedding worksite analysis here would increase diffusion and complicate vehicle control.
Minimal containment; teleoperation focuses on control, not analysis.
Some overlap with safety alerts but primary analysis should remain in NGHE Solution.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite analysis within NGHE Solution minimizes interface complexity and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution becomes too monolithic
Integration challenges with other modules if interfaces are not well defined
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution for scalability.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional requirements are clearly refined and mapped to a logically cohesive design parameter with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution with minimal diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via integrated system tests using telemetry and tasking interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of worksite analysis functions to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Consider modular sub-division within NGHE Solution for maintainability.
Clarify interface specifications for telemetry and tasking to ensure robust integration.

decision.justification: The current decomposition is sound but further refinement of sub-functions and modularization within NGHE Solution is needed to address scalability and maintainability.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect obstacles within the worksite area

revise.why: To further decompose sub-functions for detailed design and verification.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensor data is available and reliable.
AI models meet safety-critical performance requirements.
open_risks: Sensor data latency and accuracy impacting real-time analysis.
Potential integration complexity within NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: AI model validation and safety certification documentation.
